scripts.build: npx esbuild assets/js/animations.js --bundle --format=iife --minify --outfile=assets/js/dist/animations.js && npx esbuild assets/js/main.js --bundle --format=iife --minify --outfile=assets/js/dist/app.js && npx esbuild assets/css/styles.css --minify --outfile=assets/css/dist/styles.min.css
scripts.watch: npx esbuild assets/js/animations.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=assets/js/dist/animations.js --watch=forever & npx esbuild assets/js/main.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=assets/js/dist/app.js --watch=forever & npx esbuild assets/css/styles.css --outfile=assets/css/dist/styles.min.css --watch=forever
